raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section advances several causal claims — structural fleet-size-invariance of the combined strategy, rolling re-planning mismatch as the source of the PPO/CMDP gap, transition-model extrapolation beyond training distribution — each requiring verification of internal logical coherence and cross-claim consistency.","R1.3":"Precise quantitative figures (91%→40% degradation for predictive LP, 40–50% plateau for PPO/CMDP, 100% retention for the combined strategy) are asserted as experimental outcomes without inline figure or table pointers; checking whether prose claims faithfully represent the underlying data is a central review obligation.","R1.6":"A section review standardly includes evaluation of prose quality; the three-pattern enumeration structure, technical terminology (Lagrangian fragility, horizon shift, distribution shift axes), and paragraph-level transitions warrant scrutiny for clarity and precision."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize technical/logical correctness — verifying the causal reasoning, quantitative claims, and generalization argument — or writing clarity and prose quality, or are both equally load-bearing?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section advances several causal claims — structural fleet-size-invariance of the combined strategy, rolling re-planning mismatch as the source of the PPO/CMDP gap, transition-model extrapolation beyond training distribution — each requiring verification of internal logical coherence and cross-claim consistency.
rationale.R1.3: Precise quantitative figures (91%→40% degradation for predictive LP, 40–50% plateau for PPO/CMDP, 100% retention for the combined strategy) are asserted as experimental outcomes without inline figure or table pointers; checking whether prose claims faithfully represent the underlying data is a central review obligation.
rationale.R1.6: A section review standardly includes evaluation of prose quality; the three-pattern enumeration structure, technical terminology (Lagrangian fragility, horizon shift, distribution shift axes), and paragraph-level transitions warrant scrutiny for clarity and precision.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize technical/logical correctness — verifying the causal reasoning, quantitative claims, and generalization argument — or writing clarity and prose quality, or are both equally load-bearing?
